text:
(LIS) 
premium benchmark for subsidy-eligible individuals. 

LIS individuals who enroll in plans that waive the de minimis premium amount are charged a monthly 
beneficiary premium for basic prescription drug coverage rather than for the higher de minimis 
amount (i.e., full benefit dual eligible beneficiaries have a full premium subsidy and would essentially 
have $0 premium payment). 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: DEMINIMIS_PD_FLAG 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files)NCH
